content.principles: Four levels: Read Uncommitted, Read Committed, Repeatable Read (Default in InnoDB), Serializable. Solves: Dirty Read, Non-repeatable Read, Phantom Read. RR in InnoDB uses Next-Key Locks to mitigate phantom reads.
content.pitfalls: Phantom reads in RR (though partially solved by MVCC and locks). Higher isolation levels reduce concurrency. Long-running transactions bloating undo logs.
